headline: JPMorgan Lowers its Price Target on McCormick & Company. (MKC) to $64
summary: McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) is one of the 10 Best Stocks That Beat Earnings Estimates. On April 1, 2026, JPMorgan analyst Thomas Palmer lowered the price target on McCormick & Company, Incorporated (NYSE:MKC) to $64 from $67 and maintained an Overweight rating, noting the company is not receiving the “benefit of the doubt” from […]
